name: Peach Melon Conserve
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the peaches and cantaloupe in a kettle and simmer gently for 30 minutes, stirring to prevent sticking.
2. Add the sugar, lemon juice, and syrup and bring to a boil until the mixture thickens. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
3. Stir in the ginger and pecans and pour into hot sterilized jars. Pour two thin layers of paraffin wax over. Cool, cover, and store in a cool, dry, dark place.
